TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ali Asadov ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 11, Ali Asadov, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Azerbaijan ta' misuw hya' ga Ali Asadov, aring ryax tay 8 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2019 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1956 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' == canpyuta hknyun ==
S.PHON: ali as~…ēa*o* rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, ali as~…ēa*o*, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw azerő≤aijan ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ali as~…ēa*o*, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē == ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun ==
